# v0.1.0 - First Public Release

Find Your Own Skills helps Codex and Claude users choose the right installed skill before doing the work.

## Highlights

- Codex skill version
- Claude Code / Claude Desktop skill version
- Installed-local-skills-only search
- Ranked candidate list with summaries and paths
- User choice before loading the selected skill

## 中文

Find Your Own Skills 可以帮助 Codex 和 Claude 用户在执行任务前先找到合适的本地已安装 skill。

### 亮点

- Codex 版本
- Claude Code / Claude Desktop 版本
- 仅搜索本地已安装 skills
- 展示带简介和路径的候选列表
- 用户选择后再加载目标 skill
